title: zornia arenicola
intro: Zornia arenicola, also known as Beach Prune or Sandhill Zornia, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Zornia arenicola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Zornia arenicola may be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
